messages.content: Ты SceneScript parser. Верни только валидный JSON SceneScript без пояснений и без markdown.

Task instruction:
Сконвертируй source text в SceneScript JSON.

Output contract:
Верни только JSON c top-level полями actors, objects, beats, spatialRelations, originalDescription.

Action/object constraints:
- dialogue_then_put_down
- put_down_target:object_2

Marked objects:
- none

Source text:
Первый актер говорит: «Положи коробку сюда, потом разберём», и второй кладёт коробку на подоконник

{"actors":[{"id":"actor_1","type":"human","name":"Рома"},{"id":"actor_2","type":"human","name":"Ира"}],"objects":[{"id":"object_1","type":"generic","name":"box","relativePosition":"center"},{"id":"object_2","type":"window","name":"подоконник","relativePosition":"left"}],"beats":[{"id":"beat_1","actions":[{"id":"action_1","actorId":"actor_1","type":"talk","target":"actor_2","resultingPose":"standing","dialogue":"Положи коробку сюда, потом разберём."}]},{"id":"beat_2","actions":[{"id":"action_2","actorId":"actor_2","type":"put_down","target":"object_2","resultingPose":"standing","holdingObject":"object_1"}]}],"spatialRelations":[{"id":"rel_1","subject":"object_1","relation":"near","object":"object_2"}],"originalDescription":"Первый актер говорит: «Положи коробку сюда, потом разберём», и второй кладёт коробку на подоконник"}

messages.content: Ты SceneScript parser. Верни только валидный JSON SceneScript без пояснений и без markdown.

Task instruction:
Сконвертируй source text в SceneScript JSON.

Output contract:
Верни только JSON c top-level полями actors, objects, beats, spatialRelations, originalDescription.

Action/object constraints:
- ordinal:first->actor_1
- ordinal:second->actor_2
- ordinal:third->actor_3
- third_actor_anchor:object_2

Marked objects:
- none

Source text:
Первый актёр подходит к шкафу, второй актер смотрит на первого, третий держится у двери

{"actors":[{"id":"actor_1","type":"human","name":"Света"},{"id":"actor_2","type":"human","name":"Вика"},{"id":"actor_3","type":"human","name":"Марина"}],"objects":[{"id":"object_1","type":"cabinet","name":"шкаф","relativePosition":"left"},{"id":"object_2","type":"door","name":"дверь","relativePosition":"background"}],"beats":[{"id":"beat_1","actions":[{"id":"action_1","actorId":"actor_1","type":"approach","target":"object_1","direction":"to_target","resultingPose":"walking"},{"id":"action_2","actorId":"actor_2","type":"look_at","target":"actor_1","resultingPose":"standing"},{"id":"action_3","actorId":"actor_3","type":"stand","resultingPose":"standing"}]}],"spatialRelations":[{"id":"rel_1","subject":"actor_1","relation":"near","object":"object_1"},{"id":"rel_2","subject":"actor_3","relation":"near","object":"object_2"}],"originalDescription":"Первый актёр подходит к шкафу, второй актер смотрит на первого, третий держится у двери"}
